message.content:
@startuml
participant "PowerUser" as PowerUser
participant ":EnergyConsumptionInPeriodUI" as UI
participant ":EnergyConsumptionInPeriodCTRL" as CTRL
participant ":RoomList" as RoomList
participant ":Room" as Room
participant ":Device" as Device
participant ":ReadConfigFile" as ReadConfigFile
participant ":ReadingList" as ReadingList
participant ":Reading" as Reading

PowerUser ..> UI : Get Total Metered Energy Consumption

UI ..> RoomList : Show Options: Device,Room,Grid
RoomList ..> UI : Show Room List
UI ..> PowerUser : Choose a Room
PowerUser ..> UI : Ask for the time interval
UI ..> PowerUser : Input the time interval

UI ..> CTRL : tMe=getEnergyConsumption InPeriod(index, start, end)
CTRL ..> RoomList : rLS=showRoomListInStr()
RoomList ..> UI : rLS=showRoomListInStr()
UI ..> PowerUser : Show Total Metered Energy Consumption in the Room

CTRL ..> Device : tMe = getEnergyConsumption InPeriod(start, end)
Device ..> ReadConfigFile : i=getDevicesMeteringPeriod()
ReadConfigFile ..> Device : ReadConfigFile
Device ..> ReadingList : tMe=getValueOfReadings InTimeInterval(start, end)
ReadingList ..> Reading : v=returnValueOfReading
Reading ..> Device : Reading
@enduml
